steps.title: Backsolve with 20
steps.content:
Backsolving with $20$:
$$\text{Total flags} = \text{blue} + \text{yellow} = 20 + 20 = 40$$
Since the problem states there are 25 flags total, $40 \ne 25$, so this test fails.

steps.title: Backsolve with 5
steps.content:
Testing $5$:
$$\text{Total flags} = 20 + 5 = 25$$
This matches the given total of 25 flags.
A is correct.
